FanSpeedTarget.description: The target fanspeed for the PSU in percent
FanSpeedTarget.longDescription: The target fanspeed for the PSU in percent. A 0 represents that the fan is controlled by the PSU

Power.description: Reflects if this PSU outputs power
Power.longDescription: Reflects if this PSU outputs power. Can only be changed if shelf controlled is PoE-powered
